title: alsophila warihon
intro: Alsophila warihon, also known as the 'Red Stag Fern', is a species of fern that is native to the islands of New Caledonia. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Alsophila warihon include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea, infused in oil, or dried and used in tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
